name: incognito_exclusion
description: Evidence-expansion fail-closed gate (§8.1 / §8.4) — the deterministic surface of the incognito red-line. evidence_quote refuses (available=false) unless the source PROVABLY comes from a present, non-incognito session: a missing anchor and an unprovable session are both refused, so the frontend can never coax a quote out of an incognito/unknown source. The live incognito-session branch (meta.incognito) needs the session subsystem and is covered by the evidence-layer's own tests; here we lock the gate's default-deny.
